_info.text: Live session data is received automatically via SignalR WebSocket. The adapter connects 30 minutes before each session and disconnects 5 minutes after it ends.

updateIntervalNormal.label: Refresh interval (seconds)
updateIntervalNormal.help: How often race calendar and standings are fetched from Jolpica/Ergast (default: 1 hour = 3600s)

highlightColor.label: Highlight Color
highlightColor.help: Color for highlighting favorites in widgets (hex)
